items.name: Balanced Entry
items.description: Tong No phai bang Tong Co cho moi but toan.

items.name: Account Exists In TT133 COA
items.description: Moi tai khoan su dung phai ton tai trong danh muc tai khoan TT133.

items.name: Advance Recipient Required
items.description: Giao dich tam_ung bat buoc co thong tin nguoi nhan tam ung.

items.name: Reimbursement By Money Only
items.description: Giao dich hoan_ung chi cho phep thanh toan qua 111 hoac 112.

items.name: VAT Coherence
items.description: Neu has_vat=true thi bat buoc co vat_amount va untaxed_amount hop le.

items.name: Transfer Direction Valid
items.description: rut_tien bat buoc co from_account va to_account thuoc cap 111/112.

items.name: Prepaid Service Threshold Rule
items.description: Chi phi tra truoc khi amount > 3000000 va service_term_months > 12.

items.name: CCDC Allocation Source
items.description: phan_bo_ccdc chi duoc ghi nhan khi co so du 242 hop le tu CCDC.
